text_block_list.text:
I'm in the middle of a meeting with Fuji Kiseki,
when...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Sorry, my throat feels a little funny today.
choice_data_list: You okay? Did you catch a cold or something?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: The thing is, I went to sing karaoke yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
They had a lot of songs from minor musicals, so I
got carried away.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I ended up singing each one as if I were performing on stage, and... Cough, cough!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I've learned my lesson. It's never good to
go overboard, whether it's racing or singing.
